CVE-2019-8457.title: SQLite3 from 3.6.0 to and including 3.27.2 is vulnerable to heap  ...
CVE-2019-8457.description: SQLite3 from 3.6.0 to and including 3.27.2 is vulnerable to heap out-of-bound read in the rtreenode() function when handling invalid rtree tables.

CVE-2020-27207.title: Zetetic SQLCipher 4.x before 4.4.1 has a use-after-free, related  ...
CVE-2020-27207.description: Zetetic SQLCipher 4.x before 4.4.1 has a use-after-free, related to sqlcipher_codec_pragma and sqlite3Strlen30 in sqlite3.c. A remote denial of service attack can be performed. For example, a SQL injection can be used to execute the crafted SQL command sequence. After that, some unexpected RAM data is read.
